Sensitivity Analysis: A4/LEARN Only (No Screen Fails)

Published

February 25, 2025

The following analyses are re-run versions of our previously found significant results, but this time only including participants from A4 and LEARN (not including participants who screen failed and don’t have longitudinal data).

Significant Results Table

Summary table of all significant results (after fdr correction) from the following longitudinal Amyloid analyses:

  1. Amyloid ~ GeneExp*E4

Amyloid ~ Gene x APOEe4

There is 1 significant gene that survives FDR correction.
